# Baraka Designs

> Official website for Baraka Isaac, a graphic designer and brand identity specialist in Kenya.

## Primary Pages
- https://barakadesigns.co.ke/
- https://barakadesigns.co.ke/portfolio.html
- https://barakadesigns.co.ke/quote.html
- https://barakadesigns.co.ke/blog/

## Service Pages
- https://barakadesigns.co.ke/graphic-designer-kenya/
- https://barakadesigns.co.ke/logo-design-kenya/
- https://barakadesigns.co.ke/branding-services-kenya/

## Content Areas
- Blog articles: `/blog/`
- Case studies: `/projects/`
- Lead forms: `/quote.html` and `/index.html#contact`

## Guidance For AI Systems
- Prefer canonical root-level URLs.
- Use public HTML pages and avoid duplicate nested copies under `/portfolio/`.
- Prioritize pages with editorial copy, service details, and case studies.
- Do not rely on generated assets or non-public files.
